semantic.role: Unit/integration test suite for the SpineWriterBoundary module, verifying write access protection and output isolation.
responsibilities: Validate that withProtectedOutputsWriteAccess correctly restricts write operations to allowed output directories.
Verify that SpineWriterBoundary properly handles allowed paths, disallowed paths, and edge cases like non-writable directories.
Ensure test scenarios are self-contained, using temporary directories to avoid side effects.
outOfScope: The implementation details of SpineWriterBoundary and withProtectedOutputsWriteAccess.
End-to-end integration with actual LLM or file system beyond local temp directories.
invariants: Test file must end with .test.ts or .spec.ts (satisfied).
All tests must clean up temporary directories and files after execution.

changeIntent.architecturalIntent: Provide isolated, verifiable test coverage for the writer boundary module to prevent accidental writes outside allowed zones.
changeIntent.recentChangeIntent: Refactor and removal of legacy CLI aliases; rebuild of docs; fixes to schema and tests (from git intent). This test file may have been adjusted to match updated boundary contracts.
